title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Bombay Shaving Company Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Bombay Shaving Company Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Bombay Shaving Company Advisory Limited invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Digital Marketing Manager at our Vijayawada location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Bombay Shaving Company Advisory Limited:
Bombay Shaving Company Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bombay Shaving Company Advisory Limited!
